chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 899 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 22.12.2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Abdul Sattar Thaheem, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter to some length, requires the bail application to be disposed of with the direction that the learned trial Court may attempt for conclusion of the trial within a reasonable period. Learned DPG states that the challan shows eight witnesses. Accordingly, learned trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within a period of two months. Interim order dated 23.09.2025 stands recalled. Matter stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
